_meta.description: Suburban-SOC SOAR response actions (written by agent_app.log_soar_action). Pins the dashboard fields so the automated-vs-manual / action-type / per-tenant aggregations are reliable. The agent posts dotted JSON keys (action.type, response.automated, ...) which ES expands into these objects. WS0.5: backed by a per-tenant data stream (soar-actions-<tenant>) under ILM policy soar-actions-ilm (365d evidence window).
